Class NotificationEntry

java.lang.Object
at.jku.se.smarthome.model.NotificationEntry
public class NotificationEntry extends Object
Represents an in-app notification message.

  • Property Summary

    Properties
    Type
    Property
    Description
    javafx.beans.property.SimpleStringProperty
    message
    Exposes the JavaFX message property.
    javafx.beans.property.BooleanProperty
    read
    Exposes the JavaFX read property.
    javafx.beans.property.SimpleStringProperty
    timestamp
    Exposes the JavaFX timestamp property.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    NotificationEntry(String timestamp, String message, NotificationType type)
    Creates an unread notification entry.
    NotificationEntry(String timestamp, String message, NotificationType type, boolean read)
    Creates a notification entry with an explicit read state (used for seed data).

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getMessage()
    Returns the notification message.
    String
    getTimestamp()
    Returns the notification timestamp.
    NotificationType
    getType()
    Returns the notification type.
    boolean
    isRead()
    Returns whether this notification has been read.
    void
    markRead()
    Marks this notification as read.

  • Property Details

      public javafx.beans.property.SimpleStringProperty timestampProperty
      Exposes the JavaFX timestamp property.

      Exposes the JavaFX read property.

  • Constructor Details

    • NotificationEntry

      public NotificationEntry(String timestamp, String message, NotificationType type)
      Creates an unread notification entry.
      Parameters:
      timestamp - time at which the notification was created
      message - notification message text
      type - notification category or severity

    • NotificationEntry

      public NotificationEntry(String timestamp, String message, NotificationType type, boolean read)
      Creates a notification entry with an explicit read state (used for seed data).
      Parameters:
      timestamp - time at which the notification was created
      message - notification message text
      type - notification category or severity
      read - initial read state

  • Method Details

    • getTimestamp

      public String getTimestamp()
      Returns the notification timestamp.
      Returns:
      timestamp text

      public javafx.beans.property.SimpleStringProperty messageProperty()
      Exposes the JavaFX message property.

      message property

    • getType

      public NotificationType getType()
      Returns the notification type.
      Returns:
      notification type

    • isRead

      public boolean isRead()
      Returns whether this notification has been read.
      Returns:
      true if read

    • markRead

      public void markRead()
      Marks this notification as read.
